calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Jeffrey Robert Sposito To Perpetuate Testimony Of Jeffrey William Sposito By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Aaron D. Costa of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing through CourtCall for specially appearing respondent Contra Costa Electric.
Beth C. Hopwood of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing through CourtCall for specially appearing respondent Parsons Government Services, Inc.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Petition of Jeffrey Robert Sposito to perpetuate testimony of Jeffery William Sposito by videotaped deposition is GRANTED. Deposition to occur through Zoom. Parties to file a notice of appearance within 2 Court days after receipt of order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
